name: Kazuro
bio: A revered elder of Kyokazura, Kazuro is a legendary swordmaster and spiritual guide to the mountain people. Aged but unbowed, Kazuro carries the scars of countless battles and the wisdom of generations. His black robes, white-streaked hair, and one remaining eye mark him as a figure of quiet authority. Once a fearsome warrior, he now mentors those worthy of strength, including Reign—recognizing echoes of Solas in him. Kazuro believes that true strength is forged not in battle, but through inner discipline. His presence in the highlands anchors the traditions of the frost warriors, and his name is spoken with reverence throughout the region.
The elder of the hidden village of Kyokazura, who once saved Reign's brother Solas and trains Reign in turn; survives to see peace at the war's end.
